summary: First-finish smoke testing complete. All 5 backend endpoints pass. Frontend renders correctly: preloader -> hero, custom cursor (3 layers), floating nav (6 items), about+stats, work+project modal, stack+github contrib, timeline (7 nodes), contact form submits and persists in MongoDB, scroll progress grows, perf toggle switches FULL<->LIGHT. One real testability bug found: data-testid='contact-email' is incorrectly applied to the mailto <a> link in the contact-info column instead of (or in addition to) the email <input> in the form. The form itself works perfectly when targeted via placeholder/type=email selectors. Also availability-badge has no data-testid (visible text is shown).
passed: POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 with id + ISO timestamp
GET /api/contact -> 200 list, newest first (verified Playwright submission appears at top)
Preloader completes, hero shows RAJAT name + 'Researcher' typewriter + both CTAs
Custom cursor present: cursor-dot, cursor-ring, cursor-spotlight
Floating nav visible with 6 items; nav-about / nav-work / nav-stack / nav-research / nav-contact all navigate
About stats count up after intersection (4 stat-* nodes; sample value '2+')
project-card-rag present, opens project-modal, close button works
Stack: 6 stack-group-* groups + github-contrib element renders
Contact form submit -> success toast 'Transmission received. I'll reply within 24h.' + fields reset + MongoDB row created

failed.issue: data-testid='contact-email' is bound to the mailto <a> link in the left contact-info column (href='mailto:rajat.23cse@bmu.edu.in') instead of the form's email <input>. This causes any automated test trying to fill the form email field by data-testid to fail with 'Element is not an <input>...'. The form's email <input> appears to have no unique testid.
failed.evidence: page.fill('[data-testid=contact-email]') resolved to '<a data-testid="contact-email" href="mailto:...">'. Shape probe returned {tag:'A'} for contact-email but {tag:'INPUT'} for contact-name.

failed.issue: availability-badge data-testid missing (text 'OPEN TO RESEARCH & ENGINEERING COLLABORATIONS · 2026' is visible in DOM but no element carries the testid).
failed.evidence: page.is_visible('[data-testid=availability-badge]') -> False, but text is rendered in hero edge label.

action_items: Rename the mailto link testid to 'contact-email-link' (or similar) and apply data-testid='contact-email' to the actual <input type=email> inside the form so automated tests can fill it.
Add data-testid='availability-badge' to the hero availability badge element.

success_rate.frontend: ~93% (15/16 checks; only the duplicated contact-email testid + missing availability-badge testid)
